org.title: AI Tutor settings
org.description: Defaults for every course in this workspace. Courses can inherit these or override them.

course.title: AI Tutor for this course
course.description: Inherit your workspace AI Tutor defaults, or override how the tutor behaves in this course.

section.availability_description: Turn the AI tutor on or off for students in this workspace.
section.personality_description: How the tutor introduces itself and how long its replies are.
section.guidance: Things to say · things not to say
section.guidance_description: Free-text guidance the tutor will follow in every reply, plus an optional list of off-limits topics.
section.assessment_description: How the tutor behaves when a student asks for help with an exercise.
section.grounding_description: Limit what the tutor can talk about and whether it cites course material.
section.escalation_description: Where to point students when they need a real human.
section.inheritance_description: Inherit workspace defaults or set per-course overrides.

field.customPersona_description: Describe how the tutor should sound — tone, addressing style, anything specific to your audience.
field.welcomeMessage_description: Shown above the first tutor reply in every new conversation.
field.disclaimerFooter_description: Appended to every tutor reply so students remember the tutor isn't a person.
field.thingsToSay_description: Examples: "Always remind students to read the syllabus before week 3." "Encourage students to summarize lessons in their own words."
field.thingsNotToSay_description: Examples: "Don't reveal answers to the final exam." "Never tell students which review you wrote."
field.forbiddenTopics_description: Comma-separated list. The tutor will decline to discuss these.
field.revealSolutionsAfterAttempts_description: After this many failed attempts, the tutor may offer a worked example. Set to 0 to allow direct answers.

assessmentMode.block_during_exercise: Block help while the student is in an exercise

takeABreak.title: Your AI tutor is taking a break
takeABreak.learnerCap: You've hit this month's tutor message limit. Your messages reset on the 1st of next month.
takeABreak.poolExhausted: Your workspace has run out of AI tutor capacity for this month. Please check back later or contact your instructor.
takeABreak.disabled: AI tutor isn't enabled for this workspace.

workspaces.page_description: Manage the workspaces under your account. Workspaces share a single subscription and pooled usage.
workspaces.create_cta_disabled_limit: You've reached the {allowance}-workspace limit. Contact us to expand.
workspaces.delete_confirm_body: This permanently removes the workspace, its members, and its courses. This cannot be undone.
workspaces.usage_banner: {students} students and {tokens} AI tokens used across {workspaces} workspaces this month
workspaces.secondary_billing_notice: Billing is managed by your primary workspace ({primaryName}).

verify_email_modal.heading: Verify your Email
verify_email_modal.sent_verification: We've sent a verification email to
verify_email_modal.to_confirm: to confirm the validity of the email provided.

invalid_token.title: Invalid Verification Link
invalid_token.message: This verification link is invalid or malformed. Please check your email for the correct link or request a new verification email.

token_used.title: Link Already Used
token_used.message: This verification link has already been used. If you need to verify your email again, please request a new verification link.

token_expired.title: Verification Link Expired
token_expired.message: This verification link has expired for security reasons. Please request a new verification email to continue.

email_mismatch.title: Email Address Changed
email_mismatch.message: Your email address has been changed since this verification link was generated. Please request a new verification link for your current email address.

legacy_blocked.title: Unsupported Verification Method
legacy_blocked.message: This verification method is no longer supported for security reasons. Please request a new verification email using our secure verification system.

database.title: System Error
database.message: We're experiencing technical difficulties. Please try again later or contact our support team if the issue persists.

unknown.title: Verification Failed
unknown.message: An unexpected error occurred during email verification. Please try again or contact our support team for assistance.

security_notice.title: Security Enhancement
security_notice.message: We've upgraded our email verification system for better security. Old verification links are no longer valid to protect your account.

email_verification.security_footer: Your account security is our top priority. All verification attempts are logged for security monitoring.

new_course_modal.live_class_subtitle: Ideal for bootcamps where lessons are time based
new_course_modal.self_paced_subtitle: Best for courses where students can take lessons at their own pace

exercise.privacy_hint: Graded instantly in your browser — nothing is submitted.

welcome_modal.small_team: are a small team with a large mission to empower educators with great software to help them make an impact in people's lives. Education is the most powerful gift you can give anyone, and it makes perfect sense to provide you with all the tools you need to give this GIFT to more people.

team.heading: Team
team.body: Add team mates to your organization so you can both collaborate on projects.

token_auth.heading: Token Auth
token_auth.description: Let users sign in from your app with a JWT—no password needed. Generate a signing secret and use it in your backend to issue short-lived JWTs.
token_auth.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove token auth? This action cannot be undone.
token_auth.secret_shown_once: Save this secret now. It won't be shown again.
token_auth.integration_description: Sign a JWT with the secret and redirect users to the token-exchange URL.
token_auth.no_config: No token auth configured. Generate a signing secret to get started.

teams.page_subtitle: Invite teammates and control who helps run this organization.

auth.page_subtitle: Control sign-up, login, SSO, and token-based access for this org.
auth.title: Authentication

login.or_continue_with: Or continue with email and password
login.sso_redirect_error: SSO sign-in is misconfigured. Please set PUBLIC_SERVER_URL to your API server.
login.sso_required: Please sign in with SSO. Password login is disabled.
login.email_password_disabled: Email/password login is disabled. Please use SSO.
login.email_password_disabled_message: Email/password login is disabled for this organization.
login.signup_disabled_error: Signup is disabled for this organization. Please contact your administrator.

general.heading: Authentication Settings
general.description: Control how users can sign up and log in to your organization.

allow_public_signups.label: Allow public signups
allow_public_signups.description: When disabled, only users with an invite link can sign up. Enable to allow anyone to create an account.

disable_signup.label: Disable Signup
disable_signup.description: Prevent new users from signing up. Only invited users can join.

disable_signup_message.label: Signup Disabled Message
disable_signup_message.description: Custom message shown to users when signup is disabled.
disable_signup_message.placeholder: e.g., Signups are disabled, please contact learn@domain.com to get access

disable_email_password.label: Disable Email/Password Login
disable_email_password.description: Require users to sign in with SSO or social providers.

disable_google_auth.label: Disable Google Auth
disable_google_auth.description: Prevent users from signing in with Google accounts.

general.note_description: These settings only affect this organization. Admins can always sign in using their credentials for break-glass access.

internal_enrollment_only.label: Internal Enrollment Only
internal_enrollment_only.description: When enabled, any published course is open for self-enrollment to all students in your organization. Use with Disable Signup to create a closed, invite-only academy where students can join any published course without per-course setup.

connection.heading: SSO Connection
connection.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this SSO connection?
connection.callback_url_description: Copy this URL to your IdP's callback/redirect URL configuration.

policies.heading: Access Policies
policies.description: Configure how users access your organization

force_sso.label: Force SSO
force_sso.description: Require all users to sign in via SSO. Email/password login will be disabled.

auto_join.label: Auto-join
auto_join.description: Allow users with matching email domains to automatically join your organization.

break_glass.label: Break-glass Access
break_glass.description: Allow admins to bypass SSO with email/password in case of emergency.

setup.heading: Setup SSO
setup.description: Configure Single Sign-On for your organization. This feature requires an Enterprise plan.
setup.issuer_help: OIDC issuer (no trailing slash). Examples: Google Workspace — https://accounts.google.com; Okta — https://your-org.okta.com; Azure AD — https://login.microsoftonline.com/your-tenant-id/v2.0

ai_credits.cost_note: Credit usage is weighted by model cost. Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite counts as 1 credit unit per token. GPT-5.4 Mini and Kimi K2.6 count as 4× per token. Claude Sonnet 4.6 counts as 11× per token, reflecting its higher API cost.

certification.deadline_helper: Students must meet the completion percentage before this datetime (local time). Leave empty for no deadline.
certification.threshold_helper: Combined lesson and exercise progress required to earn the certificate (0–100). Default is 100%.
certification.final_exercise_helper: When set, students must reach at least the minimum score on this exercise (best attempt counts) in addition to the completion percentage above.
certification.final_exercise_multiple_attempts_note: Students will be allowed unlimited attempts on the selected exercise.
certification.min_exercise_score_helper: Score is a percentage of the total points possible on that exercise (0–100).
certification.blocker_progress: Your course progress is {current}%; {required}% is required.
certification.blocker_no_content: This course has no lessons or exercises to complete.
certification.blocker_final_not_submitted: Submit the required exercise "{exerciseTitle}" to qualify for the certificate.
certification.blocker_final_pending: Your attempt on "{exerciseTitle}" is still being graded.
certification.blocker_final_score: Your best score on "{exerciseTitle}" is {bestPercent}%; {requiredPercent}% is required.
certification.blocker_final_misconfigured: The certification exercise "{exerciseTitle}" has no points configured; ask your instructor to fix it.
certification.email_message_placeholder: e.g. We are proud of your progress — keep learning!

automation.title: Automation
automation.subtitle: Connect MCP clients now, with Zapier and the public API following on the same org-scoped key system.

permissions.disabled_description: Only organization admins can create, rotate, or revoke automation keys. Teachers can review the setup instructions here.

keys.empty_description: Create the first org-scoped MCP key to connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, or OpenCode.

mcp.page_subtitle: Connect AI tools to ClassroomIO with org-scoped keys you can rotate anytime.

usage.title: Usage and limits
usage.description: MCP is available on every plan, but usage is controlled with monthly automation credits and key limits.
usage.credits_description: Mutating MCP actions consume credits. Read actions are free.
usage.keys_description: Use one MCP key per integration so access can be rotated or revoked cleanly.
usage.rate_limits_description: Read / write / publish requests allowed per minute.

keys.title: MCP keys
keys.description: These keys authenticate the current organization when an MCP client calls ClassroomIO through `@classroomio/mcp`.
keys.secret_once: This secret is shown once. Copy it into your MCP client now.

modal.title: Create MCP key
modal.description: Choose a name for this MCP key before it is generated.

setup.title: Client setup
setup.description: Use one org-scoped key per integration. If a key is rotated or revoked, the client stops working until the new secret is configured.
setup.claude_code_description: Registers `@classroomio/mcp` with Claude Code using the generated org-scoped key.
setup.codex_description: Adds the ClassroomIO MCP server to Codex with the same org-scoped key.
setup.cursor_description: Paste this into `~/.cursor/mcp.json` or your workspace MCP config.
setup.opencode_description: Add this to `opencode.json` in your project root or `~/.config/opencode/opencode.json`.

api.subtitle: Manage API keys to integrate with the ClassroomIO public API.

keys.title: API keys
keys.description: These keys authenticate the current organization when calling the ClassroomIO public API.
keys.secret_once: This secret is shown once. Copy it and store it securely.
keys.empty_description: Create the first org-scoped API key to use the ClassroomIO public API.

modal.title: Create API key
modal.description: Choose a name for this API key before it is generated.

setup.title: Quick start
setup.description: Use your API key as a Bearer token on every request. Replace the placeholder with a key from above, or paste the secret immediately after you generate one.

zapier.page_subtitle: Automate ClassroomIO with thousands of apps through Zapier. Coming soon.

stuck_queued.title: Worker not responding
stuck_queued.body: This run has been waiting more than 30 seconds with no worker pickup. The background worker may be down or restarting.

run_summary.paused_with_counts: Run paused — created {counts} so far. Resume to continue.

ai_assistant.stopped_content_kept: Stopped. Created content has been kept.

meta.exercise_questions_added: · {count, plural, one {# question added} other {# questions added}}
meta.exercise_questions_updated: · {count, plural, one {# question updated} other {# questions updated}}

done.update_lesson_content_fallback: Wrote {count, plural, one {# character} other {# characters}}
done.create_exercise: Created exercise «{title}» · {count, plural, one {# question} other {# questions}}
done.check_go_live_ready: {warningCount, plural, =0{Ready to go live} other{Ready to go live — # warnings}}
done.check_go_live_blocked: {blockerCount, plural, one{# blocker before go-live} other{# blockers before go-live}}

ai_assistant.agent_running_warning: The changes will appear in the course once the agent is done. Don't reload the page.
ai_assistant.error_rate_limit: The AI service is temporarily busy. Please try again in a moment.
ai_assistant.error_rate_limit_with_wait: The AI service is temporarily busy. Please try again in {seconds} seconds.
ai_assistant.error_context_too_long: The conversation is too long. Try starting a new chat or shortening your message.
ai_assistant.error_network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
ai_assistant.context_full_description: The assistant will summarize older messages automatically so you can keep working in this chat.

cohorts.heading: Cohorts
cohorts.description: Give a group of people access to multiple courses, like a class
cohorts.empty_description: Create your first certification or compliance cohort.

create_modal.title: Create Cohort
create_modal.description: Add a new certification or compliance cohort.

newsfeed.heading: Newsfeed
newsfeed.editor_placeholder: Share an update with your cohort
newsfeed.delete_feed_description: Are you sure you want to delete this post?
newsfeed.empty_description: Be the first to post something.

courses.no_matching_cohort_courses: No cohort courses match your search.
courses.published_access_callout_description: Students only have access to published courses. Courses can be in this cohort for your team while still unpublished while those stay hidden from students until you publish them.

people.invite_modal_description: Add people to this cohort by email.
people.empty_description: Invite people to join this cohort.

lms.empty_description: You haven't been enrolled in any cohorts.

settings.delete_description: Once deleted, this cohort and all its data cannot be recovered.
settings.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this cohort? This cannot be undone.

goals.heading: Learning Goals
goals.description: Set measurable targets that span multiple courses for everyone in this cohort.
goals.empty_description: Create a goal to track team progress across multiple courses.
goals.delete_confirm: Delete this goal? Per-student status history will be removed.

modal.relative_days_label: Days from when the student joins

type.n_of_m: Complete N of M selected courses
type.score: Score above threshold on every course

lms.heading: Your Goals
lms.empty_description: When your instructors set goals, they'll show up here.
